subject: Fix pom.xml file
commit_message:
Fix pom.xml file

Add repository and distribution management, Remove att nexus references, add nexus.proxy property

Change-Id: I64161125872ed61b61ba68b41cdc8009f443f46b
Issue-ID: SDC-1313
Signed-off-by: Stone, Avi (as206k) <as206k@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-dcae-d-ci-master-verify-java/1/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.openecomp.d2:ui-api-ci:jar:1.0.1-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.onap.sdc.dcae-ci-tests:dcae-ci-tests:jar:1806.0.1-SNAPSHOT: The following artifacts could not be resolved: org.openecomp.d2:ui-api-ci:jar:1.0.1-SNAPSHOT, org.onap.sdc.dcae.property:DCAE-DT-PROPERTY:jar:1806.0.1-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-dcae-d-ci-master-verify-java/1/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-dcae-d-ci-master-verify-java/1
Change has been successfully merged by Michael Lando
